title: Risk & Data Coordination Specialist (12-Month Contract)
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a detail-oriented and tech-savvy professional to support our risk management processes and reporting. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys organizing information, working with data, and using technology to make processes more efficient.

Key Responsibilities

  • Maintain and update the company’s risk management portal to keep information accurate and well-organized
  • Track and consolidate quarterly risk submissions, send reminders, and ensure timely reporting
  • Prepare simple risk reports and dashboards using available tools
  • Collaborate with internal teams to validate data and improve reporting accuracy
  • Document processes and suggest improvements for risk reporting and dashboard workflows

Job Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Risk Management, Information Systems, Business, or related field
  • 1–2 years of relevant experience (internships and project work welcome)
  • Comfortable with Excel and basic data visualization tools (Power BI, Tableau, etc.)
  • Basic understanding of risk management or governance processes
  • Strong organizational and communication skills; able to coordinate across teams
  • Interest in leveraging technology and automation to improve processes
  • Proactive, detail-oriented, and acollaborative team player

Interested applicants, please submit your application to Teresa.chan@persolapac.com

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Salary range : S$5,000.00 – S$7,000.00

Location : Alexandra,Pasir Panjang (Nearest MRT station : Labrador)

PERSOL Singapore Pte Ltd EA License No. 01C4394 I RCB No. 200007268E EA Reg. No. R1107631

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.
